title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (20) لسنة 1998 بالتصديق على اتفاقية الخدمات الجوية بين حكومة دولة البحرين وحكومة بولندا
title_en: Decree No. (10) of 1998 approving the State of Bahrain's Guarantee of the Loan contained in the Loan Convention concluded between the Government of the State of Bahrain and the Kuwait Fund for Arab Economic Development to Finance the Operations Programme Projects of the Bahrain Development Bank for the Years 1998-2001
